description_long: This is a large, rectangular shipping container, commonly used for freight transport and storage. The exterior is painted a distinct orange color, with visible corrugated steel panels running along the sides and top for structural strength. The front face features double doors with locking mechanisms, reinforced hinges, and printed signage including a company logo and identification numbers. The sides are mostly plain, with some minor surface wear and additional small printed markings. The container is constructed primarily from heavy-duty steel, designed to withstand harsh outdoor environments and stacking. Its size and robust build make it suitable for placement in shipping yards, industrial zones, or urban logistics hubs.
description: A large orange steel shipping container with corrugated sides, double locking doors, and printed signage, designed for freight and storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing double doors with locking bars, hinges, and printed company logo and identification numbers.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long, corrugated steel panel with minor surface wear and small printed markings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, corrugated steel panel with no visible openings or markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with corrugated steel and minor surface details.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: printed logo and identification numbers on front doors, small printed markings on side
attribute_handles_or_grips: four vertical locking bars with integrated handles on front doors
